channel.title: Open Source on Badran Elshenawy
channel.description: Recent content in Open Source on Badran Elshenawy

item.title: Claude Series – Post 12: I Built Custom Claude Code Skills for Bioinformatics - And Open-Sourced Them!
item.description: Post 12 in the Claude series. Moving from the concept of Skills (Post 6) to a real implementation — five opinionated, interconnected Skills for R, scRNA-seq, and scientific documentation, with BadranSeq baked in as the default visualization layer.

item.title: Claude Series – Post 13: claude-mem - Give Claude Code a Brain That Remembers!
item.description: Post 13 in the Claude series. Every Claude Code session starts from zero — claude-mem fixes that with automatic context capture, AI compression, and token-efficient progressive disclosure search.
